race.description: Bmw Neue Klasse Ix3 Maiden Plate
race.comment: FASHION SPREE (8) finished fourth when resuming two runs back, then improved last start but found one better over 1206m at this track, beaten 2 lengths after being in the firing line on the corner. Has the class to figure prominently. GRAND VOILE (10) returns after four-and-a-half months in the paddock. Closed the last campaign with a eighth over 1400m at Scone. Should be forward enough following two recent trials. Has ability and is a solid chance. OUR PAPPY (2) missed the placings when resuming two runs back then didn't feature last start when 6 lengths away in seventh over 1300m at Taree after being in the firing line on the bend. Won't find this as tough so he is likely to play a big role. KEINBAH'S GIFT (7) was in the money first up at Tuncurry then could only manage fifth last time out over 1206m at this track. Fitter and can bounce back.
